name: Faribault Transportation Co
officers: Garrett O. Regan (owner per 2024 STB filing)
Patrick O. Regan (controlling shareholder of MNC Holding Company per Nov 2024 STB approval)
registry_source: MN Secretary of State (Business Filings Online) - exact filing ID not retrieved; FMCSA SAFER snapshot for USDOT 242291
notes: Legal name on FMCSA record is 'FARIBAULT TRANSPORTATION SERVICE LLC' (USDOT 242291; MC-157633). Mailing address 101 East 10th Street Ste 300, Hastings MN 55033 exactly matches the input address (Minnesota Coaches HQ). Physical location is the operating yard at 2615 1st Ave NW, Faribault MN. Family-owned student transportation and motorcoach operator; part of the Minnesota Coaches family of companies. STB Federal Register notice 2024-26469 (Nov 14, 2024) approved Patrick O. Regan acquisition of control; Federal Register notice 2025-00200 (Jan 8, 2025) documents Tiger Infrastructure Partners growth investment in Minnesota Coaches Acquisition LLC. 2 crashes (1 injury, 1 tow) past 24 months; MCS-150 last updated 3/17/2025. Note input also lists rank 867 'Metro Bus Svc Inc' at the same Hastings address - that is a related noncarrier holding-company entity, not this carrier.

name: Metro Bus Svc Inc
fmcsa_status: Not registered with FMCSA (noncarrier holding company per STB filing)
registry_source: Federal Register / Surface Transportation Board filing 2024-26469; MN Secretary of State (entity not directly verified via SOS portal due to access)
notes: Metro Bus Service, Inc. is explicitly described in the Nov 14, 2024 Federal Register STB notice as a NONCARRIER that was 'founded and incorporated' in 2005 by Patrick O. Regan and Michael J. Krois. It serves as a parent/holding company for Voyageur Bus Company, Inc. (a subsidiary motor carrier) and is related to Lake Superior Motorcoaches via revenue-sharing. Because Metro Bus Svc Inc itself is a noncarrier, it has no USDOT/MC number, no power units, and no drivers; operations roll up through subsidiaries (Voyageur etc.). Mailing address 101 10th St E Hastings MN 55033 is the Minnesota Coaches family corporate office (same complex as Faribault Transportation mailing address). FMCSA SAFER keyword search for 'METRO BUS' returned only Metro Bus Lines Inc, Lynn MA (USDOT 2969782) - no Hastings/MN match, consistent with noncarrier status.

name: Aka School Transportation LLC
carrier_operation: Intrastate passenger (NJ school bus contractor) - not found in FMCSA SAFER
officers: Abdalla M. Mohammed (key principal per D&B)
entity_status: active (presumed - active D&B profile and active NPI 1114243193)
registry_source: NPI Registry (CMS NPPES) NPI 1114243193 - taxonomy 3416L0300X Land Transport; Dun & Bradstreet profile; NJ DOE school bus contractor list (per NJ DOE PDF)
notes: AKA School Transportation LLC is confirmed at 155 Union Ave, Paterson NJ 07502-1852 (D&B). Key principal Abdalla M. Mohammed. The company holds NPI 1114243193 with land-transport taxonomy (3416L0300X) used for medical/ambulette transportation. SAFER keyword search for 'AKA SCHOOL TRANSPORTATION' returned NO records; SAFER search for 'AKA' in NJ returned only AKA EXPRESS LLC (Fairview NJ, USDOT 4170205) which is not a match. Other AKA Transportation entities found (USDOT 3944985 in Reno NV; 3593690; 4410127) are not at the Paterson address. Most likely the entity operates entirely intrastate within NJ and therefore is not required to have a USDOT number under FMCSA passenger-carrier rules; NJ school bus contractors are regulated under NJ DOE (intra-state-only contractors are exempt from USDOT registration in many cases). Formation date not retrievable via public web (NJ Division of Revenue business name search requires direct portal access; bizapedia/opencorporates were blocked by CAPTCHA).

name: St Jude's Transportation
carrier_operation: Intrastate passenger (NJ school bus contractor) - not found in FMCSA SAFER
registry_source: NJ Department of Education school bus contractor list references 'St. Jude's Transportation' as a registered NJ school bus contractor; NJ Division of Revenue entity record not retrieved
notes: FMCSA SAFER keyword search for 'ST JUDE' returned no NJ-based passenger carrier matches; all 17 ST JUDE entities found are in other states (FL, TX, CA, CO, GA, AB, AZ, TN, AR, MN-medical only). NPI Registry search for ST JUDE organizations in NJ returned 0 results. Search results indicate the company appears on NJ DOE school bus contractor code lists (homeroom5.doe.state.nj.us), confirming it operates as an intrastate NJ school bus contractor at 105 Orange St, Englewood NJ 07631. As an intrastate-only school bus operator in NJ, it is likely exempt from USDOT registration. Bizapedia returned 410 Gone for this entity; NJ Division of Revenue business name search portal access blocked. Fleet size, founding date, and principals could not be authoritatively retrieved from public sources without portal access.

name: Big Grey Bus LLC
carrier_operation: unknown - not found in FMCSA SAFER
registry_source: Colorado Secretary of State entity record not retrievable via public web search; OpenCorporates/Bizapedia access blocked (CAPTCHA / 410)
notes: FMCSA SAFER keyword search for both 'BIG GREY BUS' and 'BIG GREY' returned zero records. Multiple targeted Google searches did not surface a Denver-area passenger carrier called Big Grey Bus LLC on Yelp, Y! Local, or industry directories; only unrelated companies (Big Bus Denver/Good Time Tours partybus, Gray Line of Colorado tour operator) appeared. The input address 650 S Cherry St # 1200, Denver CO 80246 is a multi-tenant office tower (Cherry Creek Place I), suggesting this is a registered-agent / mailing address rather than an operating yard; consistent with a very small or newly formed LLC. Likely an intrastate-only operator (charter/shuttle/possibly school) below the FMCSA registration threshold, or a shell/holding entity. Colorado SOS business search would confirm formation date and registered agent but was not directly retrievable via WebFetch (HTTP 403 / CAPTCHA challenges).
